# Tanx's Whistle

## Description

Upon pickup, add 1 Whistle to your deck.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Adds a powerful stun card but increases deck size; prefer when the deck can afford a 3-cost single card or can cheat/play it with Cascade-like effects.
